mnemonics: Binary Search Tree: Insert a new node, Traverse the tree, Search for a value, Find the Maximum and Minimum
keyPoints: Multilayered structures In Trees Easily Recognized
Search for a value: Compare with the root, Traverse the left or right subtree
Minimum value: Start at the root, Traverse the left subtree
Maximum value: Start at the root, Traverse the right subtree
Copy a tree: Recursive function, Create a new tree node, Assign the value and children
Insertion in a Binary Search Tree: Compare the value with the root, Traverse the left or right subtree, Insert the value
